headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -45.5)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 83% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 138 quotes and an overwhelming 101 at strong intensity - people are expressing deep anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 60.6 sits in the middle range but represents a major spike from yesterday's 19.1.

• Both fears and optimism remain subdued, with fears recovering somewhat from yesterday's deeper negativity.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
